title: Project: Echelon Watch — Global Surveillance Network
body: ECHELON WATCH is a joint task force between NSA and FBI for global electronic surveillance. Key objectives include monitoring of encrypted communications across 147 countries. Domestic application requires FISA court approval. Budget allocation for FY2023: $2.4 billion. Director's Note: This program does not exist.

title: Subject: Fox Mulder — Personnel File
body: Agent Fox William Mulder (Badge: 8A73B5). Assigned to Violent Crimes Section, later reassigned to X-Files Division. Psychological profile indicates obsessive tendencies toward paranormal phenomena. Multiple disciplinary actions for insubordination. Note: Agent Mulder's clearance level should not grant access to files above his pay grade. Monitor closely.

title: Incident Report: Unauthorized Access — Datacenter 7
body: On 2023-01-14 at 0342 hours, an unauthorized breach was detected at Datacenter 7 (Quantico, VA). Perimeter logs show no physical intrusion. Data analysis suggests the breach originated from an internal terminal. Files accessed: ECHELON-related documentation. Investigation assigned to Internal Affairs. Status: OPEN.

title: Operation: Nightfall — Counterintelligence
body: OPERATION NIGHTFALL targets a sleeper cell operating within the Washington D.C. metropolitan area. Suspects are believed to have infiltrated three government agencies. Wiretap authorization granted under FISA. Surveillance teams are active. Next phase requires judicial approval. Caution: Do not discuss this operation over unsecured channels.

title: Evidence Log: Unidentified Aerial Phenomena
body: Evidence recovered from crash site near Roswell, NM (Case # UAP-1947-07). Current location: Storage Vault 12-B, Quantico. Items include: metallic alloy fragments (non-terrestrial origin analysis PENDING), unknown energy source (inert), documentation in unknown language. Access requires Level 5 clearance and written authorization from Deputy Director.
